TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nikos_Christodoulides, title = Nikos_Christodoulides, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nikos_Christodoulides} }

S.FORM: Nikos Christodoulides ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 12, Nikos Christodoulides, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1973) mrhuw Cyprus ta' misuw hya' ga Nikos Christodoulides, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2023 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Nikos Christodoulides minkahul sa Geroskipou na Cyprus. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1973 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Nikos Christodoulides ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 12, Nikos Christodoulides, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1973) mrhuw Cyprus ta' misuw hya' ga Nikos Christodoulides, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2023 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Nikos Christodoulides minkahul sa Geroskipou na Cyprus. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1973 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: nikos~ɕ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕto*ouli*es~ɕ rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, nikos~ɕ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕto*ouli*es~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨjprus~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa nikos~ɕ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕto*ouli*es~ɕ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral nikos~ɕ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕto*ouli*es~ɕ minkaħul s~ɕa ɣeros~ɕkipou na ʦ~ʨjprus~ɕ. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
